comment.body:
This was the downside pivot mentioned in Alma's note. 30 points below. Might just touch and go upwards or just continue climb back upwards. 

"The downside pivot is at 6676.14, where the spot would break out of the gravitational field of the center of the fly, and step into the left tail down towards 6514.36
But again: the positioning is right-tail heavy."
